scripts.test:e2e:mobile: firebase emulators:exec --only hosting,auth,firestore,storage --project departamento-medico-brisa "node tests/e2e/seed-emulators.mjs && playwright test tests/e2e/mobile-ui.spec.mjs --project iphone-13 --project android-412"
scripts.test:e2e:mobile:scroll: firebase emulators:exec --only hosting,auth,firestore,storage --project departamento-medico-brisa "node tests/e2e/seed-emulators.mjs && playwright test tests/e2e/mobile-scroll.spec.mjs --project iphone-13 --project android-412"
scripts.test:e2e:committees:desktop: firebase emulators:exec --only hosting,auth,firestore,storage --project departamento-medico-brisa "node tests/e2e/seed-emulators.mjs && playwright test tests/e2e/committees-desktop.spec.mjs --project desktop-1440"
scripts.test: npm run test:safe-dom && npm run test:rules
